[Local Dev Mode - Math/Reasoning Solution]
Formula/Logic: Solve using standard All Topics principles.
Step 1: Identify details from the question stem: "The marks of P are 10 more than the marks of Q. The marks of Q are 10 more than half of the marks of P. The marks of Q are ____.".
Step 2: Solve step-by-step:
  - Analyze parameters: options provided are A) 20, B) 30, C) 40, D) 36.
  - Apply logical derivation to determine the correct value.
Step 3: The calculated result is B) 30.
Final Answer: Therefore, the correct option is B) 30.
